color_text_info_list: Skills are of great importance to win races
text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Skills are of great importance to win
races. Using the skill menu does not
expend a turn, so be sure to learn as
many as you can!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I concur. Hoarding your skill points is a
tragic waste of potential!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course! You should select skills that
best match your trainee's abilities and
the races she plans to run in!
